source.definition: to remove clothing or to leave a place

explanation.sourceText: The English verb “undress” is formed by the prefix “un-” meaning 'reverse' or 'remove' and the verb “dress,” which means to put on clothes. It literally means to remove clothing.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „undress” este format din prefixul „un-” care înseamnă „a inversa” sau „a elimina” și verbul „dress”, care înseamnă a îmbrăca. Literal înseamnă a da jos hainele.

source.additional: Regular verb. Commonly used when referring to taking off clothes or changing residence.

target.definition: a lăsa jos ceva (de exemplu, îmbrăcăminte) sau a părăsi un loc

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian verb “a (se) dezbrăca” originates from the Slavic word “zŭbrati” (to undress, to strip), with the prefix “de-” added to form the verb.
explanation.targetText: Verbul românesc „a (se) dezbrăca” provine din slavonul „zŭbrati” (a dezbrăca), cu prefixul „de-” adăugat pentru formarea verbului.

target.additional: Das Verb wird häufig verwendet, um das Ausziehen von Kleidung zu beschreiben. Das reflexive „se“ zeigt an, dass die Handlung auf die Person selbst gerichtet ist.

explanation.sourceText: The word is frequently used to describe taking off clothes.
explanation.targetText: Cuvânt folosit frecvent pentru a descrie dezbrăcarea hainelor.

explanation.sourceText: The word can also be used when someone leaves their place of residence.
explanation.targetText: Poate fi folosit și pentru a exprima mutarea dintr-un loc în altul.

examples.sourceText: I move into a new apartment.

learningTips.text: Remember that “a se dezbrăca” is reflexive—the “se” shows the action is done to oneself, just like undressing your own clothes.
Think of “dezbrăca” as ‘de-’ (remove) plus ‘brăca’ (related to clothing), helping you recall it means to take clothes off.
Compare “a se dezbrăca” (to undress) with “a îmbrăca” (to dress) to remember their opposite meanings.
Link the sound of “dezbrăca” with the English word ‘dress’ to help remember it relates to clothing.
